flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Susquehanna University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($27.6k → $32.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Susquehanna University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.1k → $59.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Susquehanna University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (74.1% vs 79.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Susquehanna University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
